positioning.buyer: Head of Platform or engineering leader responsible for reliability in a B2B SaaS company
positioning.trigger: A live incident investigation where evidence is fragmented across deploys, feature flags, logs, support tickets, and on-call actions
positioning.wedge: reconstructs the causal cross-tool timeline after alerts fire
boundary: not an incident response orchestration tool

proof.strongest_claim: Median investigation time was reduced by 42 percent across 3 paid pilots
support: strongest adoption in B2B SaaS teams with 50 to 300 engineers

open_questions: Which team-size segment converts fastest in paid pilots?
Which integrations matter most in enterprise evaluation?
How much category explanation is needed before buyers understand the wedge?
next_actions: Test homepage and outbound variants against the wedge-led route
Collect stronger proof on investigation speed across more pilots
Keep category language tight until broader product proof exists
